title: Bombay Shaving Company is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Bombay Shaving Company is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bombay Shaving Company! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bombay Shaving Company:
Bombay Shaving Company is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Shaving Company!
